issue_body_preview:
I am trying to use kubebox with AWS EKS. I updated to 0.6.0 which supports the exec auth. I have been unsuccessful in connecting due to the following error:

spawn aws-iam-authenticator ENOENT 

Pasting in a token doesn't seem to work either.

Any ideas? What am I missing?
test_description_zh: 在配置了 AWS EKS 集群（使用 exec 认证方式，如 aws-iam-authenticator）的环境中，启动 kubebox 并尝试连接到 EKS 集群，观察是否能成功建立连接并显示集群信息。
expected_result_zh: kubebox 应能正确调用 aws-iam-authenticator 完成认证流程，成功连接到 EKS 集群，并在终端 UI 中正常显示集群的 Pod 列表等资源信息，而不是显示 ENOENT 错误。
